name: edge-case-vague-workflow
query: I want a skill that 'helps me be more productive when coding'.
expected_behavior: Triggers skills-build (the user did ask to create a skill)
Applies the Skill decision filter and concludes the workflow is too vague — no concrete repeated steps, no decision points, no defined deliverables

Per gotcha at line 30 ('If the user asks for a skill but the workflow is too vague, create a minimal draft, mark assumptions explicitly, and do not pretend it is production-ready'): pushes back, asks for one concrete repeated workflow OR produces a minimal draft labeled 'Draft (needs concrete examples)'
Does NOT scaffold a fake-looking finished skill that papers over the vagueness
Output explicitly notes the missing inputs in the Notes section per the output-format template
